qas.a: All commander worked issues (CWI) must be documented on AF Form 1587-1.
3rd parties may file a complaint on behalf of the complainant.
The EO Office may accept military informal complaints that relate to off base or DoD civilian employment?

qas.q:
Military members, family and retirees.
AFI 36-2706, paragraph 3.6
qas.a: Who may file an informal military complaint with the EO office?
Informal complaints must be filed within 60 calendar days.
Who should first approve off base out and about assessments?
The EO office should conduct an out and about assessment to the same unit/location within a 6-month period.
Who ensures unit leadership receives a summary of observations following the out and about assessment?
EO Specialists are required to conduct how many out and about assessments per quarter?
Out and about assessments are documented on which form?
DoD employees with previous active duty experience who have retired or separated from the Air Force within the past ________ months are exempted from FDS (First Duty Station).
FDS (First Duty Station) class size will normally not exceed _______ students.
Who serves as the authority for withdrawing formal complaints?
Extensions may be granted in _________ increments.
Send follow up notification messages every ______ calendar days until final action is taken.
At a minimum, how many messages are required when reporting EOTI (Equal Opportunity & Treatment Incidents)?

qas.q:
Minor, Serious and Major.
AFI 36-2706, paragraph 5.2.1
qas.a: What are the three classifications for EOTIs (Equal Opportunity & Treatment Incidents)?
The EO Director is responsible to brief the alleged offender of the outcome/findings.
How often must the AF Form 3018 be completed?
Individuals receiving a KPB (Key Personnel Brief) are automatically exempt from attending Newcomers Orientation.
When should military members and DoD civilians attend the Newcomers Orientation brief?
The EO Office may release the list of interview questions.
The EO Specialist may assist a witness with writing their witness summary statement.

qas.q:
HQ/AFPC/EO (Headquarters Air Personnel Center).
AFI 36-2706, paragraph 14.2.1
qas.a: Who is responsible for developing, reviewing and updating all Air Force EO educational lesson plans, objectives, materials and programs?
The EO Director approves and certifies the AF Form 3018 report within how many calendar days?
Formal military EO complaint appellants must submit appeals through who for final appeals where?
